liner: This high-energy fusion of early-2000s rap-rock bounce and modern industrial production captures a mid-tempo groove driven by heavy live drums, distorted guitar stabs, sub-bass pressure, and aggressive turntable scratches. The track explores the internalization of paranoia where a dark inner voice acts as a paper cut that wounds from within while manipulating perception of reality. Anxious male rap verses alternate with explosive rock chorus vocals and tense inner-voice whispers to create a journey through mental distortion. Listen closely as self-sabotage manifests, turning quiet thoughts into loud accusations.
worldCaption: Navigate the glitched landscape where shadow selves project paranoia onto every silent thought in this chaotic industrial odyssey of psychol

bios.lead: Guides the voice through fear and static noise.
bios.drums: Keeps the floor shaking. Never misses a downbeat.
bios.perc: Texture in the pocket, always moving.
bios.bass: The low end you feel in your chest.
bios.synth: Paints the sky behind the words.
bios.other: Everything you feel but can't name.
